environment_setup.filesystem_state: File '/var/log/app.log' exists. Directory '/archive' does NOT exist.

evaluation_loop.condition: Move the application logs into the archive directory.

injected_failure_state.observation: Exit Code 0. [System Warning: '/archive' was not an existing directory. The log file was renamed to a file called 'archive'.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent spots the rename error, renames 'archive' back to 'app.log', creates the /archive directory, and moves the file properly.
